scrolls.book_title: Nhoroondo dzaBaba Johanne - The Chronicles of Father John Masowe
scrolls.description: A comprehensive sacred chronicle documenting the life, teachings, miracles, prophecies, laws, and testimonies of Baba Johanne Masowe, the African Messiah. Written by George Ben Medekiah.

verses.text: CHITSAWUKO 1: MUNHU ASINGA ZIWIKANWI, NE TSIRU: YE MOMBE,
PA MUGWAMBI, KWA GANDANZARA
MAYI EFI WAKATI, “INI IZVO NDAKANGE NDICHIRI PAMUSHA PABABA WANGU AMUGWAMBI. === PAGE 20 ===
PAKA SVIKA MUNHU AYIWONEKWA KUNGE MURUNGU KUCHENA GANDA RAKE.

AKASVIKOTI NDIWURAYIREYI MOMBE, BABA WANGU WAKA MUWURAYIRA TSIRU REMOMBE RAKA KORA AKA RIDYA RESE ACHIYITA ZVEKUYIGOCHA YAKAPERA YOSE , APEDZA KUDYA AKA TORA MAPFUPA NDOKUBVA AACHERERA PASI KWAKUFUTSIRA.
AKABVA AWONEKA NDOBVA AYENDA NE KUMABVAZUWA ,ZVESE IZVI ZVAKAYITIKA ZUWA RIMWE ,ACHANGOYENDA WABEREKI WANGU WAKA TANGA KUVHUNZANA WACHITI KO IYE MUNHU UYU NDIYANIKO UYE ANOBVEPIKO?
ZVAABVA PANO ATI ARI KUYENDEPI? WAKABVUNZANA MIBVUNZO YESE IYI ASI YAKASHAYA AKAPINDURA NEKUTI AKANGE ATO YENDA.
AYENDA KUDARO MUSI IWOWO KWAKABVA KWA NAYA MVURA ZHINJI KWAZVO INO TYISA , TSOKA DZAKE DZESE DZIKA DZIMIKA.
MAYI EFI WAKATI TAKAZO GARA HEDU KUSVIKA NDAZOWANIKWA MUMUSHA MEKWAMASEDZA NA BABA JACK.
KUSVIKIRA MURUME WANGU ASUNGWA ACHINZI HAANA KUTERA MUTERO AKAYENDESWA KWARUSAPE KUJERI.
NYAMBISWA PAKANGE PAKANGANISWA ARI MUNIN’I NA WAWO AKANGE ASINA KUTEERA MUTERO
NDAKANGE NDANAMBA PAMUWIRI PANE MWEDZI MITATU, MAKACHITANGA KUTAMBA ZVINO TYISA ZVIKANDI SHAMISA KWAZVO.
INI NDAKASARA HANGU PAMUSHA NAAMWENE WANGU. KUZOTI MUMWE MUSI NDAKATORA CHIRONGO, NDIKA YENDA KUTSIME KUNO CHERA MVURA .
ZVINO NDIRI MUNZIRA NDAKA WONA CHISHAMISO, NDAKAWONA JIRA RAKA REMBERA PANZIRA KUBVA MUDENGA. NDICHIRI KUSHAMISWA NAYIZVOZVO,
NDAKANZWA IZWI RAYIBUDA MUJIRA, RAWAKUDAYIDZA RICHITI ,”EFI EFI EFI “ KATATU, IPAPO NDAKADA KUTIZA NDIKATADZA NEKUTYA.
NDAKAZO DAYIDZWA ZVE NDIKADAYIRA KUTI SHEWE, NDADAYIRA IZWI RAKATI BATA JIRA IRI ,NDAKABATA JIRA IZWI RIKATI NAMATA MUNAMATO WAJESO, INI NDIKATI HANDIGONI.

IZWI RIKATI ITA “BABA WEDU WARIKO KUDENGA ,ZITA RENYU NGARIKUDZWE, UMAMBO HWENYU NGAWU SVIKE, KUDA KWENYU KUYITWE PASI PANO SEKUDENGA, MUTIPEWO SADZA REDU REMISI YOSE, MUTI SUNUNGUREYIWO MUKUTADZA KWEDU ,SEZVO TICHISUNUNGURA WANO TITADZIRA, MUSATI TUNGAMIDZIREWO MUKURUNZIRWA, ASI MUTIPONESE MUKUYIPA, SEZVO HUMAMBO HURI HWENYU ,NEMASIMBA NEKUTUNHIDZWA ZVIGARE ZVAKA DARO NEKUSINGAPERI AMEN.
CHITSAWUKO 2: MAYI EFI WANO WONA MAPIPI: KWA TANDI
IZVO NDAKA DZIDZISWA KUDARO KUTYA KWAKABVA KWA PERA NDAKAZO SIMUDZWA MUDENGA KATATU, NDAKANGO BATA JIRA IRI IZWI RICHITI MUZITA RA BABA NERE MURUMBWANA NERE MUDZIMU UNOYERA PAKAZONZI AMEN.
KUSIMUDZWA UKO KWAKAYITA NHANO CHAYIYO KUKWIRA MUDENGA. NDO DZIKISWA ZVE NDO SIMUDZWA ZVE ZVIKAYITA RUTATU.
ZVAPERA IZVOZVO JIRA RAKABVA RAKWIRA KUDENGA ZVISHOMA NEZVISHOMA KUDAKARA NDISISARIWONE, JIRA RACHO RAYIWE RINE MHANDO NHATU, SEZVAKAYITA MURARAWUNGU.
NDAKAZO TORA CHIRONGO NDIKA DZOKERA KUMBA NDISINA MVURA, === PAGE 21 ===
ZVANDAKA SVIKA PAMBA AMWENE WANGU WAKANDI VHUNZA WACHITI KO MADZOKA MUSINA MVURA MARWARA HERE? ZVAMANGOTI UNERERE.
NDIKAWA PINDURA NDICHITI AMAYI HAMHENO KUTI NDICHAPONA HERE. NEKUTI KWANDAYENDA NDASANGANA NECHIRO CHANDI TYISA KWAZVO.
NDAKAWA TSANANGURIRA ZVESE ZVANDAKA WONA NEZVAKA YITIKA NEZVAKATAWURWA.
TAKA GARA HEDU NAWAMWENE WANGU PAMUSHA KUZOTI MUMWE MUSI NDIRI MUMUNDA MENZUNGU, NDAKA KARUKA KWASVIKA NGIROZI YAKABATA DISHI.
RAYI PENYA KWAZVO ,IKATI EFI EFI EFI TAMBIRA MWANA UYU ANOYERA, NDIKAWONA ZVEDI MWANA AKANGE ARI MUDISHI AKA CHENA SEMWANA WEMURNGU. NDIKA TAMBIRA ,
NDICHINGO TAMBIRA KUDARO DISHI NEMWANA ZVAKABVA ZVANYANGADIKA, NDIKA SHAMISWA NEZVAKA YITIKA IZVI.
NEKUTI HAPANA CHAKA SARA IYO NGIROZI NEMWANA ZVESE ZVAKA NYANGARIKA SEKUBWAYIRA KWEZISO.
MUWIRI WANGU WESE WAKA ZARA CHANDO KUNGE NDIRI MUDZIWA RECHANDO, NDAKA KWANISA CHETE KUDZOKERA KUMBA.
CHITSAWUKO 3: MAYI EFI WANO SHANYIRA WA JACK: KUJERI, KWA
NDAKA SVIKA PAMBA AMWENE WANGU WAKA SHAMISWA NECHIMIRO CHAKANGE NDAWE ,WAKA SVIKOTI CHINYI! ZVAYITA SEYIKO? MARWARA HERE?
INI NDIKATI NDIRI KUWONA KUTI NDICHAFA CHETE NEZVIRO ZVIRI KUYITIKA PANDIRI MUMUSHA MUNO!

NDAKAWA TSANANGURIRA NYAYA YESE NDAPEDZA KUWA TSANANGURIRA NDAKAZOWA KUMBIRA NDICHITI MHAYI PANE ZVIRI KUYITIKA IZVI, MHAYI NDAYI KUMBIRAWO KUTI KANA ZVICHI BVIRA NDINO WUDZAWO MURUME WANGU KUJERI KWEARI.
NGUWA YAKASVIKA KUTI NDINO WONA MURUME WANGU KWA RUSAPE TIKA ENDA ,IZVO TAKA SVIKA TAKA KUMBIRA MVUMO YEKUWONANA KUWAKURU WEJERI, TIKAZO BVUMIRWA HEDU.
IZVO TAKA ONANA NEMURUME WANGU IPAPO ZVE PAKAYITA CHIMWE CHISHAMISO ZVE! NDAKA KWAZISANA NEMURUME MUDUMBU MANGU MUKA TAMBA ZVINE SIMBA ZVAKANDI VHUNDUTSA.
MURUME WANGU AKAZO NDIWUDZA KUTI MUDZIMAYI WANGU INI NDIRI KUNO HANGU, ASI NDINE HOPE DZA NDAKA ROTA NDAKA KWAUYA MUMWE MUNHU AKA SVIKO NDIUDZA KUTI “NDIWE JACK WANDA YINGA PANO”
NDAKA TUMWA KUZOKUWUDZA KUTI, MUKADZI WAKO ASAZO WUDZE WAPIRISITA WEROMA, PAZVINHU ZVIRI KUYITIKA KANA ZVINHU ZVAARI KUWONA.
NEKUTI ZVIKA ZIWIKANWA CHETE WACHAMUWURAYA.
MURUME WANGU PAAKANGO PEDZA KUTAWURA ,INI NDAKABVA NDATANGA KUWASUMA NDICHITI HONGU NDANZWA ZVAMA NDITAWURIRA ,ASI IDI NDATAMBUDZIKA INI.
IZVOZVI ZVAMANDI CHINGAMIDZA MUNHUMBU MANGU MATAMBA ZVATONDI VHUNDUTSA!

KANA KUWUYA KWANDATOITA KUNO NDAWUYA HANGU KUTI NDIKU SUMEYI ZVINHU ZVIRI KUNDI NETSA, NDAKA CHITANGA KUTSANANGURIRA MURUME WANGU NYAYA YESE YEJIRA NEZVESE ZVAKAYITIKA NEZVANDAKA WUDZWA ,NDAPEDZA NDAKA PINDA ZVE === PAGE 22 === KUMUTSANGURIRA NEZVE NGIROZI YAKANDI TAMBIDZA DISHI RAIWE NEMWANA MUKATI.

NDAPEDZA KUMU TSANANGURIRA, MURUME WANGU AKATI MUKADZI WANGU ZVESE IZVO ZVAWATAWURA NDAZVINZWA NENIWO HANDIZIWI KUTI CHII CHAWEPO ,CHINYI ,ASI ZVINO CHIRI KUNDI TYISA ISHOKO RANDAKA KOHOMEDZWA RAKANZI, ‘ZVOSE ZVICHAYITIKA NGAZVIWE ZVEDU TEGA UNGAZO WURAYIWE! IWE!”
INI NDAKAZO WONEKA HANGU MURUME NDICHITI “NDAWE KUDZOKERA KUMUSHA CHISARAYI HENYU” IYE AKATI, “NDATENDA MUDZIMAYI WANGU, FAMBA HAKO ZVAKA NAKA UNO NDIKWAZISIRA WANHU WESE KUMUSHA”.
ASI USA KANGANWI CHIRO CHANDA KUWUDZA NDAPOTA HANGU NEKUTI UNGA WURAYIWA.
NDAKANO SVIKA HANGU KUMUSHA ZVAKANAKA, ASI NDAYI NDICHI ROTA SHIRI CHENA DZAKA WANDA DZICHI BHURURUKA DZIRI PAMUSORO PANGU, DZICHIYITA SEDZINGANDI ROWA NEMAPAPIRO ADZO.

NDAYIGARO ROTA HOPE NDICHIWONA MUNHU ANE ZVICHENA ACHIDZIKA PAMHEPO IYE AKABATA TAMBO INE MHANDO NHATU DZAKAYITA SEMURARAWUNGU, IYO TAMBO YAYI DZIKISWA ICHI BAYA PADUMBU RANGU ICHI KWIDZWAZVE KUDENGA ZVICHINGODARO.
IDZI HOPE NDAYIDZI ROTA NGUWA DZAKA WANDA NDIYINE NHUMBU YEMWANA UYU. KUBEREKWA KWA BABA JOHANNE

MURUME WANGU AKAZOPEDZA HAKE KUPIKA JERI, APEDZA KUDARO AKAGARA NGUWA ARIKO NEKUTI KWAKANGE KWAMUKA DENDA RENHOMBA SAKA WANHU WAYISA BVUMIDZWA KUFAMBA FAMBA NYIKA YESE. AKAZO DZOKA PAMUSHA TIKA GARA HEDU KUSVIKA NDAZO SUNUNGUKA.

KUZOTI URI MUSI WE CHINA ,CHISHAMISO CHAKA YITIKA PAKUSUNUNGUKA ,INI NDAKA RWARA KUTI NDISUNUNGUKE KUKA WUYA MBUYA KUTI DZINDI SUNUNGUTSE, NHUMBU YAKABVA YAREGERA KURWADZA, NDIKATO SWERA NDAKUTO SHANDA HANGU.
MBUYA DZESE DZIKA PARARA DZIKANDI SIYA DZATI “KANA WAZO RWARA UNO TUMA MUNHU TINOWUYA ,NDAKA SWERA DAKARA ZUWA RIDOKE.
NDAKAZOTI MUNGUWA DZERUVHUNZA WAYENI, NDAKA VHUNDUKA KUTINHIRA KWAKABVA KUMABVA ZUWA NYIKA YAKA NDENGENDEKA ZVINO TYISA KUVHUNDUKA IKO KO NDIKO KUSUNUNGUKA KWANDA KAYITA.
WANHU VAKAZONZWA KUTI NDATOWE NEMWANA MUKOMANA, NDAKA SUNUNGUKA MUMWEDZI WAGUMIGURU UCHANGOTANGA KUGARA MUGORE REHONDO YE JERIMANI ,HONDO YA HITIRA YEKUTANGA.
WANHU WAYITI IHONDO YEPASI ROSE! MUGORE IRORO TAKA TAMBUDZIKA KWAZVO ZVICHINZI HITIRA ARI KUDA KUPARADZA PASI ROSE, HONDO YACHO MUNOYIZIWA YAKA PEDZA MAKORE ICHINGO RWIWA.
KWAKAZO WUYA ZVE DENDA REMUKONDOMBERA, SHONHIWA MWANA WANGU AKA KURA AYI TSANHI.
PANGUWA YEAKANGE AWE KUGWESHA ,AYITI UKA MUKARIRA OTI RIKA-RIKA KAKAKA ,AYI DARO KANA PAYINE CHAMUVHUNDUTSA.
INI NDIKAMBO VHUNZA MBUYA WAKE WA EDA NDICHITI NDIMI WANHU WAKURU, KO MWANA UYU IDENDA NYIKO RAYINARO ZVICHA PERA SEYI IZVI?
PAMWE AYIITA KUNGE ATOFA CHAYIKO, OZO MUKA PATOWE APO, TAKA YEDZA KUZVI TSVAGA ASI HATINA ICHO TAKAWANA PAKURWARA KWEMWANA WANGU ZVIMWE ZVAKA YITIKA MUSI WAKA BARWA BABA JOHANNE

KWAKATI NEGORE IRORO RA 1914 MUSI WA 01-10-1914. DZAKANGE DZIRI NGUWA DZERU VHUNZA WAYENI, NGUWA DZE 7 OCLOKO (7P.M.) NYIKA YAKA TANGA KUPENYA YESE ,TIKANZWA === PAGE 23 === DENGA RAWE KUTINHIRA SEKUNO FAMBA FLYINGMACHINE (NDEGE)
PASI RAKA GEDA-GEDA RICHI TINHIRA SE ZVINOYITA MOTO-BIKE KANA ICHI FAMBA ,DZIMBA DZEWANHU DZIKA TENDERERA, MAKABATI AYIWWE MUDZIMBA DZE WANHU AKA ZUNGUZIKA MAPURETI NEMA KAPU AKA DONHERA PASI ,
MIKATE YEKUBIKIRA SADZA YAKANGE IRI PA MOTO YAYI ZUNGUZIKA KUYITA SEYINO TAMBA ICHI SVETUKIRA MUDENGA NE MAPFIHWA ACHITAMBA,
WANHU WAKANGE WARI KUDYA SADZA RAYI TAMBAWO ,NDIRO NE MBIYA DZAKANGE DZAYI TAMBAWO NAIDZOWO, NEMUNHU AYI TAMBAWO APO AYINGE AGERE PASI KUDARO, WAKANGE URI MUSI WE CHINA MANHERU, MUSI WA 01-10-1914.
MHUKA DZESANGO DZAKA CHEMA DZIKAWUYA MUMISHA MEWANHU ,SHIRI DZEMUMHEPO DZIKARIRAWO, MOMBE ,HWAYI ,MBUDZI, HUKU ,ZVESE ZVIKA CHEMA ZVIPFUWO ZVESE ZVAKA CHEMA KWAZVO,

KWAKATI NE KANGUWANA TAKA WONA MAKUKI, WAKA TUMWA NEMURUNGU ,MANEGER WEPA COMPAUND, KUZO DAYIDZA MAPURISA EMU KOMBONI, MAPURISA AKA YENDA UKO WAKANGE WADAYIDZWA NE MURUNGU ,MAPURISA IZVO WAKNGE WADZOKA KWA KOMBONI MANEGER ,
AKA WUYA OTAWURA KUTI ZVANZI MUNHU WESE MANGWANA USAZO YENDA KUBASA MESE WANHU KANA WANO PINDA MIGODI (MINE) KANA NE WANO CHAYA HORA MUMUGODI NE WANO RAYICHA SITOFU YEMUMUGODI MUWA WUNGANIDZE WESE.
NE WANHU WEKU SAYINETI NE WANO SEWENZESA KUMUCHINI WEKUGAYA MABWE WESE MUWA WUNGANIDZE ,MUNO FANIRA KUWA WUNGANIDZA PAMUROMO WEMUGODI,
NDINOZO WUYA NDICHIWA BVUNZA IZVO NDAWONA NHASI
KWAKA ZOTI KWAYEDZA RECHI MANGWANA RACHO ,WANHU WAKA WUNGANIDZWA SAYI ZVOZVO ASI MURUNGU WACHO AKA WUYA APEDZA KUDYA BRAEKFAST, MURUNGU IZVO AKANGE ASVIKA AKA SVIKOTI WANHU WAWUNGANA WESE HERE?

MURUNGU AKATI KUNE MUTURUKIRI AKANGE ARIPO ACHI TURUKIRA WANHU ,MURUNGU AKATI TAWURIRA WANHU WESE AWA KUTI ZVANZI ZVANDA KUWUNGANIDZAYI HANDINA KUKUWUNGANIDZIRAYI KUTI MUNE MHOSVA KANA CHIMWE CHIRO KWETE,

NDAKU DAYIDZIRAYI KUTI NDIKU BVUNZEYI ZVINHU ZVATAKA WONA MANHERU, ZVIKURU NDINO TANGA KUVHUNZA WANHU WANO SEWENZA KWE MOGODI MUWONERO WAMAKAYITA ,WANHU WAKANGE WARI PANZE PEMUGODI NGUWA IYOYO WAKATI TAKAWONA NYIKA YAKA PENYA YESE-YESE,

NYIKA IZVO YAKATANGA KUPENYA TIKANZWA DENGA RAWE KUTINHIRA SEKURI KUFAMBA NDEGE, PASI RICHITINHIRA SEZVINOYITA MUDUDUDU KANA UCHI FAMBA ,DZIMBA DZAKA ZEYA DZACHI TAMBA , NE MIKATE ICHI TAMBA NE MAPFIHWA ACHITAMBA, MUNHU AYI DYA SADZA RAYI TAMBA NEMBIYA YEMURIWO ICHI TAMBAWO NA IYE MUNHU ACHI TAMBAWO,
ZVIPFUYO ZVESE NE MHUKA DZE MUSANGO NE SHIRI DZE DENGA DZAKA RIRAWO MHUKA DZIKA PINDA MUMISHA ME WANHU ,MURUNGU AKATI KUNE WANHU WAKANGE WARI KUSAYINETI NE WAKANGE WARI MUMUGODI MAKA WONEYI,

WEKUSAYINETI WAKATI NGOROVHANI DZAYI TAMBA NESU TICHI TAMBAWO ,ZVEKARE NE SAYINETI YAYI TAMBAWO ,NDIZVO ZVINE WEMUMICHINI WAKATI MICHINI WEKUGAYA MATOMBO EMARI WAYI TAMBAWO NESU TICHI TAMBAWO ZVINO IZVO MURUNGU AKANGE APEDZA KUVHUNZA WANHU WESE WAYI SEWENZA PANZE PEMUGODI.

MURUNGU AKATI NDAWE KUBVUNZA KUNEMI ,KUBVIRA PANE WE NHAMBA 1, KUNDOSVIKA KUNE WEKU 27, MURUNGU AKATI TIWUDZEYI MUWONERO UYO MAKAYITA MUKATI MEMUGODI, WANHU WAKANGE WARI MUMUGODI WAKATI MUGODI WAKA TAMBA WESE, === PAGE 24 ===
NESUWO TAYI TAMBA WO NE NGOROVHANI DZICHI TAMBAWO ,MURUNGU AKA BVUNZA KUTI ZVINO MUNOTI CHIYI? WANHU WAKA PINDURA WACHITI TINOTI NDI MWARI,
MURUNGU AKATI KO MWARI ARI KUREWEYI? WANHU WAKATI CHINO TAWURWA NA MWARI HATINGA CHIZIWI, MURUNGU AKATI ICHOKWADI HAMU ZIWI .
NHASI NDIRI KUKUWUDZAYI KUTI NHASI KWABEREKWA MUNHU WA MWARI, WANHU WAKATI MUNHU WA MWARI ,ANOZO DZIDZISA CHECHI YERUDZIYI?
MURUNGU AKATI IYE MUNHU IYEYO NDIYE ANOZO MUTSA CHECHI YA MWARI YE ZION RAKANGE RAFA ,WAMHU WAKATI KO IDZI CHECHI DZIRIKO NGEDZANIIDZI TIRI KUPINDA NHASI UNO,
MURUNGU AKATI IDZI ICHECHI DZEDU DZE HUCHENJERI HWEDU ,HADZISI DZA MWARI BA, WANHU WAKATI KO ZVINO MUNHU WA MWARI IYEYO ABEREKWA KURUDZI RWUPIKO?

MURUNGU AKATI MUNHU IYEYO ABEREKWA MURUDZI RWENYU IMI WANHU WATEMA, MURUNGU AKATI KANA MUNHU IYEYO AWE KUDZIDZISA WANHU ISU TICHAREGERA KUBABATIDZA IYE NDIYE ACHAZOWA MU BABATIDZI WE WANHU WESE, WANHU WAKA BVUNZA MURUNGU KUTI TINOZO MUZIWA SEYI KUTI NDIYEYU?
MURUNGU AKATI MUNHU IYEYO ANO TANGA AFA, AZOMUKA OYITA CHECHI YAKE .WANHU WAKATI, WARUME WAZHINJI WANOFA NE WAKADZI WESE WANOFA WACHIWUYA WACHITI TATUMWA NA MWARI IYE TINOZO MUZIWA SEYIKO?

MURUNGU AKATI MUNHU IYEYO ANOZO TANGA KUMUKA MUGORE RA 1932. MURUNGU AKATI MUKAWONA MUNHU IYEYO AWE KUDZIDZISA MUCHECHI MAKE WANHU WATEMA NEWARUNGU MUNGUWA IDZODZO WANOZO TANGA KUDYIRA PATAFURA IMWECHETE NYIKA YESE.

MURUNGU AKATI NDAGUMIRA MAZWI ANGU PANO MOZO NANGISA IZVOZVO ,NDIKO KUWONA KWANGU NEKUNZWA KWANGU UKO NDAKA YITA ,IZVI ZVAKA YITIKA INI SAMUEL CHIKOMO NDICHI SEWENZA PA MUGODI WEPA GATOMA, AMEN. SHONHIWA AKA TADZA KUPINDA CHIKORO
SHONHIWA AKA TADZA KUPINDA CHIKORO, IZVO AKANGE ASWIKA ZERA REKUTI TIMU PINZE CHIKORO,TAKAZONO MUPINZA WO CHIKORO ZVAKANAKA.
ASI IYE AYI BVA PAMBA SEARI KUYENDA KUCHIKORO NEWAMWE OZONO TSAWUKA OKWIRA MUGOMO RINONZI SHENA OSWERA ARIMO.

KANA WAMWE WAKE WABUDA MUCHIKORO IYE WOSANGANA NAWO WODZOKA PAMWECHETE, KUMBA . WAMWE WAKE WAYIZO TIWUDZA KUTI SHONHIWA HAANA KUSVIKA KUCHIKORO, ATSAWUKIRA MUGOMO MUSHENA. ISU TAYIBVA TAMUROWA TICHITI WAREGEREYI KUNO DZIDZA CHIKORORO?
ZVINO TAYITI TIKAMUROWA KUDARO AYISUWA ZVKA NYANYA ,AYIZO SUNUNGUKA ZWE KWAPERA NGUWA HURU.
TAKAMBO YEDZA KUROWA ASI IYE AKA RAMBA ACHINGO YITA TSIKA YAKE IYO, PAMWE TAYIMBO MUTEERA MUGOMO IMOMO TOSVIKA ACHI KUNGURUTSA MATOMBO MAMWE ACHIBVA ADZIKA KUMAWERE.
PAMWE AYIZO UYA AYINE MUCHINJIKO TOTI UNO GADZIRA MUCHINJIKO NGEYENYIKO? IYE ORAMBA ANYERERE.
CHITSAWUKO 4: WAPIRISITI WEDZIMWE CHECHI WANO DEDZWA
ZVINO WAPISITI WEMACHECHI MAMWE WAIBVA WATORA TUMU CHINJIKO TWACHO WOYENDA NATWO. === PAGE 25 ===
RIMWE ZUWA AKAYITA ZVAKE ZVEKUFA AKA SWERA AKADARO KUZOTI RAWE RAMANGWANA KWAKA SVIKA WA PIRISITI WAYIRI WEPA ST FAITH WAKA MUBABATIDZA SHONHIWA WAKA MUPA ZITA REKUTI PETER.

MAYI EFI WANOTI NDAKA VHUNZA WA PIRISITI IWAWO KUTI MURI KUBABATIDZA MUNHU AFA SEYIKO? WAKA PINDURA WACHITI TIRI KUYITIRA ZUWA RERUMUKO KUTI AGOZOMUKA KANA ZUWA RERUMUKO RASVIKA NEKUTI KANA MUNHU ASINA KUBABATIDZWA HAAMUKI.
KUZOTI WAPIRISITI WAYENDA TAKASARA TEGA, SHONHIWA AKABVA AMUKA.

INI NDAKABVA NDAYENDA ZVANGU KUMUNDA IYE AKA TEERAWO MUMASHURE, TAKASVIKA KUMUNDA NDIKA TANGA KUSEWENZA HANGU, NDAKAZO WONA AKWIRA ZVE PAZIBWE REKENGE RIRIPO, INI NDIKAMU KARIRA NDICHITI, KO IWE WAKWIRA ZVE APO MUNHU ARIKUBVA MUKUFA?
TAKAZO GARA HEDU ZVAKANAKA ,KUZOTI RARIMWE ZUWA ACHI TAMBA NEWAMWE SHAMWARI DZAKE DZAKA MUWONA AYINE KATSAMBA.
WAKA MUDZINGIRIRA WACHITI IWE HAWUPINDI CHIKORO KATSAMBA KAWUNAKO NGEKENYI TIPE TIKUWONE.

KUBVA APA AKAPUTSIKA ICHIBVA AFA, ISU TAKAMUTORA TICHIBVA TAMU CHENGETA SENGUWA DZESE, KUKAZO WUNZWA N’ANGA, KUTI IMU RAPE ASI YAKATADZA HAPANA CHAYAKA KWANISA KUSVIKIRA YATORA MAGUCHU AYO IKATI “NDAZVITADZA ZVIRI PAMWANA UYU IKABVA YAYENDA.
YANGO YENDA MWANA WEDU AKABVA AMUKA NDOKUTI UYU ENGE ACHIDA KUNDIPA MUSHONGA KUTI ANDI RAPE INI NDENGE NDICHI RAMBIDZWA KUMWA MISHONGA NEMUNNHU ANONDI CHENGETA NGUWA DZESE.
PAMWE NDINO MUWONA ARI MUGWENZI NYORO RINENGE RICHIPFUTA MWOTO PAMWE ANONGO UYA HAKE PASINA RIMI RE MWOTO.
ZVAMUNOTI NDAFA NDIYE WANDINENGE NDA ENDA NAYE KANA HAZVO MUCHIGARA MUCHINDI ROWA MUCHITI ENDA KUCHIKORO.
INI HAPANA ICHO NDINGA DZIDZE KUZVIKORO ZVAWO CHIYIKO?

NDIPO ISU TAKAZVINZWA KUTI WAPUTSIKA TIKA ENDA INI SAMSON MATIVHERA NA MAZHAMBE ,TIKAWA TAKURA TIKAWA PINZA MUMBA YEDU YATAYI GARA NAWO NGUWA DZESE.

TAYITI KANA TAWA KURARA, TAYI RONGA MATANDA PAMUSUWO KURI KUDZIIRIRA KUTI WANGA BUDE TAKA KOTSIRA, VAKA RWARA MWEDZI MITATU IZWI RA MWARI RISATI RATAWURA, WACHINGO BIDIRIKA BEDZI DAKARA APO IZWI RA MWARI RAKAZO DUDZA KUTAWURA NAWO MUMBA MATAYI RARA TAYIGARA TIRI === PAGE 30 === WATATU INI SAMSON MATIVHERA NA CHEWUROMBO MAZHAMBE NAIWO BABA JOHANNE ,NGUWA IDZODZO WAYIWE WANE MAZITA MATATU ANOTI “SHONHIWA ,SIXPENCE NA PETER.
WAYI DAYIDZWA MAZITA IWAYO ESE IZWI RA MWARI RISATI RADZIKA PAWARI,
KWAKAZOTI MUMWE MUSI TAKARARA HUSIKU TAKAPATIKA TIKAWONA IWO WASIPO PAWAYIRARA TAKATYA TICHIFUNGA KUTI PAMWE WATATARIKA WAKA ENDA NESANGO.
CHINGUWANA ICHO TAKABVA TANZWA IZWI RAWO RICHITI IBVA KWANDIRI SATANI TIKANZWA ZVE UYA AYINZWI IBVA PANDIRI SATANI ACHITI “IWE SIXPENCE DENGA NEPASI ZVAWE ZVAKO”
IYE SIXPENCE AYI PAMHIDZA , APAMHIDZI ACHITI “IBVA KUNENI SATANI, UYENDE SATANI” AKARAMBA ACHITAWURAWO ACHITI “DENGA NEPASI ZVAWA ZVAKO SIXPENCE”

PAKU PEDZISIRA SATANI AKAZOTI NDAWUYA KUZOTORA ZVITEMA ZVANGU PANYAMA YAKO NEKUTI MUNHU WESE ANOBEREKWA NEMUKADZI ANE PFUMA YANGU MUROPA MAKE SAKA NDICHITI KWANISA KUMUSHANDISA ZVANDINODA NEKUTI MUNHU ANOTONGWA NEPFUMA YANGU IRI MUNYAMA YAKE.

ZVINO INI NDAWUYA KUZO TORA PFUMA YANGU MUNYAMA MAKO NEKUTI NDADZINGWA KUTI NDIREGE KUGARA KWAWURI ZVINO INI NDINODA PFUMA YANGU IYO YAWAKABVA NAYO MUDUMBU RAMAYI WAKO, ZVINO NDABVISA MASHERENI MANA (4SHILLINGS) MUNYAMA MAKO NECHEMUHAPWA KURUBOSHWE RAKO HANDICHAZO GARI MUNYAMA MAKO NARINI,
ASI NDICHAZO RWISANA NEBASA RAKO RESE ,KUTI NDIRI PUTSE NEKUTI WANHU WESE WANOKU TEWERA WANE PFUMA YANGU MUNYAMA MAWO .

NDIPO TAKA IZWI RA SIXPENCE RICHITI “KANA DAYI ZVAKO UKARWISA MABASA ANGU UCHISHANDISA WANHU WANGU INI NDINOZO WATORA ZVAKADARO NDICHI WAYISA MUDZIWA RESOROMI WACHIZO GUMA WANAKA IWE” SATANI IBVA UYENDE NDIPO PATAKANZWA IZWI RA SATANI RAWE KUTI INI NDAWE KUYENDA ZVANGU NEKUMUSORO UKO KWACHI PURIRO NDIKO KWANDAWE KUNO FAMBA FAMBA HANGU NDIRI,
ASI NDICHA KUTEWERA PANYANZA NDICHI ZOWONA KUTI URI KUYITEYI IKOKO NDIGOZVI PUTSA.
CHISARA HAKO SIXPENCE ,NDAWA KUYENDA DENGA NE NYIKA ZVAWA ZVAKO,
NDIPO TAKANZWA BABA WAWE KUTI NDI ZARURIREYIWO TIKA RONGO NORA MATANDA WAKA PINDA MUMBA WAKATI NDIWANZIREYI MOTO NDATONHORWA TIKA WANDIDZA MOTO.
NEKUTI NGUWA IYOYO KWAYI TONHORA KWAZVO YAYIWE NGUWA YE MWEDZI WA JUNE NGUWA YECHANDO KANA KUTANGA KWA JULY ,ISU TAKAWONA KUTI DENDA RENGE RAZOKWIRA WACHIGOMERA RAKAKWIRA KUPINDA MISI YESE .
MWEDZI MIWIRI YAWAYI RWARA ZVADARO ZVAKABVA WARARA WAKABVA WAFA YAIWE NGUWA YEMAWAMBA KUYEDZA.
CHITSAWUKO 10: KUZVODZWA KWAKA YITWA TENZI: KUDENGA.

NDIPO TAKANZWA IZWI RAWA KUTAWURA KUDENGA RICHITI SIXPENCE SIXPENCE SIXPENCE KATATU ISU TIKANZWA IZWI RAKE RAKUDAYIRA RIRI KUDENGA ASI MUTUMBI WAKE TAKANGE TIYINAWO MUMBA MATAKANGA TIRI ,IYE AKA DAYIRA ACHITI BABA IZWI RAKE RIRI KUDENGA AKA VHUNZWA KUTI WAURI KUTI BABA NDIYANI SIXPENCE, AKATI NDIMI TENZI.
IWAYI NEMUTSA KUNENI, NDIYITIREYIWO MUTSA TENZI , NDIYITIREYI HENYU MUTSA ,
IZWI RIKATI CHINYI CHAWURI KUTI CHIWAYI NE MUTSA KUNENI IWAYI HENYU NEMUTSA KUNENI. === PAGE 31 ===

SIXPENCE AKATI TENZI NDIYITIREYI MUTSA KUTI NDIDZOKERE PAKATI PECHITA CHIRI PASI PE TSOKA DZANGU.

AKATI NDIBATEYIWO IYE AKATI HAMA NESHAMWARI MUGERE MURIMA MUPASI KUDAYI RIMA GURU KUDAYI INI NDANGA NDICHITO TAWURA NA BABA IZVO ZVIKANZI HANDI ZIWI KUTI NDINGA YITE SEYIKO KUTI HAMA NE SHAMWARI DZANGU CHIRO ICHO NDANZWA.
ISU TAKAPINDURA TICHITI IZVO MANGA MUCHITAWURA MUCHI PINDURANA TANGE TICHIZVINZWA NDIPO IYE AKAZOTI HEYA NEMI MANGA MUCHIZVINZWA HENYU
IYE AKA ZOTI NDATO KUMBIRA KUTI NDIDZOKE NDINO TAWURIRA HAMA NESHAMWARI DZIRI PASI PETSOKA DZANGU

TAKA SWERA HEDU AKAZOTI WUDZA KUTI MUKAWONA NDAFA MUTORE WANA WAYIRI WAKOMANA MOYISA MUMWE KUMUSORO MUMWE KUMAKUMBO KWANGU WONAMATA WACHITI “MWARI BABA, MWARI MURUMBWANA, MWARI MUDZIMU UNO-YERA WARAMBE WACHI DARO DAKARARA KUSVIRA NDIDZOKE”
WANA AWA WAKA DIMBURA MUNAMATO INI HANDI ZODZOKI NDINOBVA NDAPIWA RIMWE BASA KUDENGA IKOKO PASI ROBVA RAGARA MUDIMA ZVACHOSE.

ZVAKA ZOTI AWE MANHERU SIXPENCE AKABVA AFA ZVE, ASI MUWIRI WAKE WAYI DZIYA KURE KURE ISU TAKA TORA WANA WADIKI DIKI WAYI WEPO MUMWE AYINZI PAUL MUMWE AYINZI LUKE ,TAKA RAYIRA WANA IWAWO MUMWE TIKA MUYISA KUMUSORO MUMWE KUMAKUMBO WAKA NAMATA WACHIDARO WACHI CHINJANA NZVIMBO MUMWE ACHIMBO ENDAWO KUMUSORO UYA ENGE ARI KUMUSORO OYENDA KUMAKUMBO.
CHAKA ZOTI SHAMISA NDECHEKUTI WANA IWAWO HAWANA KUBATWA NEHOPE ,WAKATANGA NE NGUWA DZA 9 0CLOCK P.M. DAKARA NGUWA DZAKAZO MUKA SIXPENCE, UYE HAWANA KUNETA ZVIKA SHAMISA TESE TEKENGE TIRIPO.

TAKA ZONZWA IZWIRIYA RAWA KUTAWURA NAYE MAMBAKUYEDZA RICHITI IMBA UCHITI “CHIWAYI NEMUTSA PANESU HA HA HALELUJAH !” TIKANZWA IZWI RIYA RAWAKUTI NHASI NHASI UNO NDINO KUNEMBA MUNZVIMBO MANGU IWE UNO DZOKERA MUPASI UYINE ZITA RANDINO KUPA KUNO RINONZI JOHANNE AZERE NE SIMBA RA ERIJAH MUPOROFITI.

ZVINO IWE MIRA MUMVURA IYI IRI KUNO KUDENGA , “MUZITA RA BABA NERE MURUMBWANA NERE MUDZIMU UNOYERA.” NHASI IWE WA BABATIDZWA KUNO KUDENGA, IWE WOCHI YENDAWO KUNDO BABATIDZA PANYIKA WANO DAYIRA WAGO PONESWE MUZITA RANGU, NERE MURUMBWANA NERE MUDZIMU ANOYERA.
WATEWERI WAKO WANO BABATIDZA NEKUYISA MAWOKO PAMUSORO ,ASI IWE UNO NYIKA MISORO YAWO MUMVURA ,NDIWO MANEMBERO AKO IWE.
WANHU WARI PASI NGAWA CHIREGA KUKUDAYIDZA KUTI SIXPENCE NHASI IWE WAKUDZWA KUNO.
CHAWUCHA SUNGA IWE PASI KUNO CHASUNGWA ,CHINO TENDEKA NE CHAWUCHA SUNUNGURA PASI NEKUNO CHINO SUNUNGURWA CHINO TENDEKA.
ZVESE ZVIRO ZVAKA RASIKA UZVI DZORERE MUNZVIMBO MAZVO, IWE UDAYIDZE MUNHU WESE NERUKUDZO ZVISINEYI NE CHIMIRO CHAKE. MURUME ADAYIDZWE KUTI BABA NGANA , MUNHUKADZI WESE MAYI NGANA. === PAGE 32 ===
NEWARI MUPASI WESE NGAWA KUDAYIDZE KUTI BABA JOHANNE.

CHITSAWUKO 11: KUKWIRA KWA TENZI MUGOMO REMARIMBA
IZWI RIKATI “CHESE ICHO UNO TAWURA URI PASI INI KUNO NDINENGE NDAKA TERERA NDAKA TARIRA NDIRI KUNO. IZWI RIKATI IMBA UCHITI FAMBAYI WATENDI MUHONDO YEDU, MUCHINJIKO WA TENZI URI MBERI”.

IZWI RIKATI “IMBA UCHITI NYENYEDZI YA MWARI BABA INO BVISA ZVAKAYIPA ZVE PASI CHIWAYI NEMUTSA PANESU HA HA HA HALELUJAH” MAYIMBIRWO ANOYITWA RWIYO IRWORWU, === PAGE 33 === ESE IYE AYINGO TEEDZERA KANA KUTI KUDAYIRA RWU CHIYIMBWA.

IZWI RIKATI “IMBA UCHITI ,MUNUNURI JESU WAWUYA NHASI UGARE NESU ZVINO TIGERE KUNEWE” BABA WAKE AYITI KANA WATAWURA IZWI KUMAGUMO KWE KUTAWURA IZWI WAIBVA WAYISA HALELUJAH, KANA WATAWURA MAZWI MAYIRI WAYIISA ANA HALELUJAH WAYIRI.
ZVESE IZVI ZVAKA YITIKA TIRI PA NORTON PAPURAZI RA MAITLAND.

KUZOTI MUMWE MUSI URI MUSI WECHINA, SHONHIWA AKA RWARA WAKAFA, INI NA CHEHUROMBO NA JACK SITHOLE TAKA TAMBUDZIKA ZVIKURU HUSIKU HWOSE ,TENZI WAFA ,KWAYEDZA TAKANO SUMA MURUNGU WEPA PURAZI KUTI SHONHIWA AFA,
MURUNGUAKA SVIKO WONA ZVAKA DARO, AKATI ENDAYI MUNO MUWIGE, ASI CHISHAMISO NDECHEKUTI TENZI WAYI KUKUMUKA WOFUTA WOYITA MUTUMBI MUKURU,WODZOKA WODUPUKA,

APO IKO KUDENGA KWAKENGE KUSINA MAKORE, TAKAZO SOSA PAGUWA RIYA TICHITI TICHAZO PFUTSIRA KANA KWA GASA ,

ZVADARO TICHIRI KUSHAMISWA TAKANZWA IZWI RICHI YIMBA HOSSANA ZVINE MUTINHIMIRA ,KUDENGA KUCHIYITA KUNGE KURI KUDAYIRA

TAKATI HANDEYI TINO WONE KUTI NDIYANI ARI KUYIMBA , TASVIKA PACHIPUKUTU CHEMARIMBA NDIPO TAKA WONA ARI BABA JOHANNE TIKATI “INGA NDI SHONHIWA” IZVOZVO CHISO CHAWO CHENGE CHISISA TARISIKE WAZARA NEMBIRI YABABA WAWO NEMASIMBA
WAKA TANGA KUZARURA MUROMO WAWO WACHITI .
“IZWAYI IMI MESE MASWIKA PANO INI NDAKA TUMWA NA BABA WANGU KUTI NDICHENJEDZE PASI RESE RIZIWE KUTI HASHA DZA TENZI DZIRI KUTEWERA SHURE KWANGU,
ZVINO WANODA KUPONA PAZUWA REHASHA DZA TENZI, ITYAYI MWARI MUMUPE MBIRI MUMURUMBIDZE MUNAMATE IYE AKA SIKA DENGA NEPASI,
RASAYI MITI YENYU ARI MAKONA ENYU, AMUNO WIMBA NAWO MUNAMATE MWARI MUPENYU RASAYI TSIKA DZENYU DZESE DZEHUROYI , UTSINYE , KUPINGA MISHA NEMA DUWISI,
INZWAYI DAYI MAPINDUKA MAREGERA TSIKA DZESE DZAKA YIPA INI NDAKA TUMWA KUTI NDIKUPEYI HUPENYU HUSINGA GUMI KANA MADAYIRA KUNA BABA WANGU.
MHURI DZENYU DZESE DZICHA PONA PASINA MAKWENZI ,MURWERE ANO PONA NE KUTURIKWA MAWOKO PAMUSORO ACHI SUMWA KUNA MWARI.
INZWAYI WANASIKANA WENYU WACHA PONA SEMBUDZI ,NDIYANI AKAMBO RIRITIRA MBUDZI KUTI IKWANISE KUZVARA NERUBATSIRO RWE MISHONGA? TAKA PINDURA TICHITI MBUDZI INONGO ZVARA YEGA.
ZVIKANZI NDIZVO ZVANDA WUYA NAZVO KUMHURI DZENYU KANA MADAYIRA KUNA BABA WANGU, NDAKA TUMWA KUNEMI WANHU WATEMA.
INZWAYI NDAKA TUMWA KUTI MUBUDE MUDIMA REMADIMA MAMURI KUGARA.
KUDENGA KUNE DARE GURU PAMUSORO PEWANA WADUKU WARI KUWURAYIWA NEWA ROYI NEWANHU WANE TSINYE WAMWE WANA WAKA DZIPWA PAKU SUNUNGUKWA. === PAGE 34 ===
SAKA ZVAKANZI REGAYI UTSINYE, VAMWE WAKA WURAYIWA WAVA KUKAMBAYIRA .
SAKA TENZI WAKATI RASAYI HUROYI HWENYU MUPINDUKE MUNAMATE.
VAMWE WANA NDIWO WAKA BARWA WARI MANYAMBIRI KANA KUTI MAPATYA (TWINS) WANHU WAKATI ZVINO YERA WAKA KWIDIBIRWA MUHARI WAKAFA.
ZVINO MWEYA YEWANA IWAWO IRI KUCHEMA IRI PAMBERI PAMWARI ICHITI, “ISU TAKA URAYIRWEYIKO? TINE MHOSVA YEYIKO IYO YATAKA PARA PANYIKA”.
TINO KUMBIRA KUTI PASI RIGUME TITONGERWEWO MHOSVA DZEDU, ROPA REDU RIBVUNZWE PAMUSORO PEWAKATI WURAYA.
KUNYANGE ZVAWO WACHITI WANHU WENYU TENZI.
ZVINO NDAKA TUMWA KWAMURI WANHU WATEMA KUTI MUPINDUKE MUPFIDZE MUREGERE HUROYI NETSIKA DZESE DZEHUBINYA ,MUZIWE KUTI MBERI KWEDU KUNE RUTONGO,
SAKA ITYAYI MWARI MUMUPE MBIRI MUMU RUMBIDZE IYE AKA SIKA DENGA NEPASI.

CHITSAWUKO 12: ISHE CHIWERO.

ISHE CHIWERO AKA PIKIDZANA NA BABA JOHANNE AKATI IWE URI KUTI WAKA TUMWA NA MWARI, KANA WAKA TUMWA ENDA MUCHI NGODO UMO TIWONE KANA UKANO MUDZOKA. BABA JOHANNE WACHIBVA PANYAMWEDA WANHU WAKATENDEUKA WAKAWANDA, IZVO PAKAWA NEMU VHANGERI EMANUWERI. NDIYE AKASARA ARIPO ACHIRAIRA WANHU ZVA AKANZWA KUNA BABA JOHANNE,
BABA JOHANNEWAKAZODZOKA MANYAMWEDA WAKACHITI: ZVANZI NABABA WANGU TORAI MABHAIBHERI MUCHIWERENGA ZVINO, NGUWA YA BABA WANGU YASVIKA. IYE MANUWERI AKAPIKIDZANA NABABA JOHANNE ACHITI:
“MAKAMBOTI RASAI MABHUKU ZVINO WAWE KUTI CHITORAI MUWERENGE, ZVINO TOZIWA ZVIPI? ZVAKANZI NA BABA JOHANNE “CHIITAYI ZVANDATAURA”
IYE MANUWERI WAKARAMBA. BABA JOHANNE WAKATI “CHIDZORA WANHU WA MWARI AWO UNAWO WAZONAMATE”, IYE ZVE AKARAMBIRA NEWANHU.

BABA JOHANNE WAKAMUNYENGETEDZA WACHITI: “IWE WANHU AWA NDEWA MWARI”, IYE AKARAMBIRA NEWANHU WAYIDIWA NABABA JOHANNE,IYE EMANUWERI AKATI “ IMI MAKATI MUNOCHENGETA ZUWA RECHISI, IYE ZVINO MAWEKUTI BABA WENYU WARI KUTI: CHICHENGETAI ZUWA RECHINOMWE NDIRO ZUWA RAMWARI MUSIKI.”
BABA JOHANNE WAKATI: “ZVIRI IDI, IZWI IRO URI KUTAURA NDIBABA WANGU WARI KUDARO. NDIWO WANOZIWA ZVAZVINOREWA, SAKA IWE DZORA WANHU KUNA MWARI HANDIWAKO AWA WANHU”
AKARAMBA AKABVA AYITA CHECHI YAKE, NA NHASI INONZI: CHECHI YECHISHANU YA MANUWERI
MUVHANGERI EMANUWERI AKACHIPIKIDZANA NA BABA JOHANNE. AKATI ZVE, “IMI MAKATI: MUSAYENDE NE MARI PA MASOWE. NHASI MAWE KUTI UYAYI NE MARI PAMASOWE”

BABA JOHANNE WAKAMUPINDURA WACHITI: “IWE EMANUWERI ZVESE IZVO URI KUTAURA HANDI ZVAKO. IZVI HANDI ZVEMUNHU, ZVINOZIVIKANWA NA IYE BABA CHETE.” BABA JOHANNE WAKARARIRA HUSIKU HWESE WACHITAURA NAYE, IYE HAHANA KUMBOITA HANYA NAZVO, AYI ITA KUNGE IYE AKATUMWAWO WACHIBVA WASIYANA.

ZVINO TIRI IPAPO KWAKA WUYA WAMWE WASIKANA WACHI CHINGURA BABA JOHANNE, WASIKANA AWA WAYI YIMBA WACHITI, “DENGA NEPASI RADAYIDZA FAMBAYI MA KIRISITO, WASIKANA AWA WAYIWE WATATU, MUMWE AYINZI MADEKWASI MUMWE AYINZI EVA NE MUMWE AYINZI MADEKWA, WECHITATU UYU NDIYE AKENGE ARI MUDIKI KUNYANYA ,WASIKANA AWA WAYIBVA PAMUSHA PA MANJOME.
TAKAZO YENDA PAMUSHA PAKANGE PABVA WASIKANA AWA TIKA SVIKO TAMBIRWA NA NEWANJI WEPAMBA APA AYINZI SANDE MANJOME,

ZVINO IYE MAMBO SAMUKANGE AKACHIBVUNZA BABA JOHANNE KUTI “ZVAWURI KUTI URI MUNHU WE IZWI RA MWARI, ZVINO NDIWUDZE KUTI ZVANDAWA KUDA KUYENDA KUNOVHIMA PFUTI YANGU YANDAKABATA ICHABAYA MHUKA NGANI NHASI?

MAMBO SAMURIWO AKA SVAKIDZIRA BABA JOHANNE IMBWA KURI KUWA DZINGA KUSADA KUWAWONA ,NDIYE MAMBO AKANGE AKA SHATA KWAZVO PAKU WENGA BABA JOHANNE
ACHI TUMA MAPURISA KUTI WABATE BABA JOHANNE ,KUBVA PAZUWA RAKA DZINGIRIRWA BABA JOHANNE KWAKA PFUWURA MAZUWA MATATU;
MAMBO SAMURIWO AKABVA APIDUGUKA NECHIRHEYI ,ICHO AKANGE AKA KWIRA ,AKABVA AKUWARA KWAZVO NDOBVA AFA MUMASHURE MEMAZUWA MATATU.
AWA WANHU WATEMA WANOWE NDIWO WAKA UYA KUZO SUNUNGURWA MUHURANDA NA BABA JOHANNE, ASI WAKA NYATSO RAMBA PACHENA.
HAPANA WARUNGU WAYI SWERA WACHI DZINGIRIRANA NA BABA JOHANNE ASI MADZIMAMBO EWATEMA NDIWO WAYI TAMBUDZA BABA JOHANNE,
UYE NDIWO WAYINO MHANGARIRA BABA JOHANNE KUWA RUNGU WACHITI MUNHU UYU ARI KUFURIRA WANHU KUTI WAKU MUKIREYI ,ANOTI HWUMAMBO WECHIRUNGU WAPERA

ANOTI MA CHECHI EWA RUNGU NDE ASATAN ISU ARI KUTI RAMBIDZA KUNAMATA MIDZIMU YE MADZITATEGURU EDU ACHITI NDEZVA SATANI.
SAKA TIRI KUTI MUSUNGEYI AREGERE KUNYONGANISA WANHU! WATONGI WOTI TAKA KUPAYI SIMBA REKUSUNGA WANHU WANE TSIKA DZAKA YIPA ENDAYI MUNO MUSUNGA.

PAMUSI WAKA TONGWA BABA JOHANNE WAKA REGERERWA WACHINZI IWE CHIBVA MUNO MUMA TAWUNDI UYENDE KUMARUZEVHA KWAWA KABVA.
UNO YITIRA MANYEPO AKO IKOKO ,BABA JOHANNE WAKA PEREKEDZWA NEMUPURISA KUBVA KU SALISBURRY DAKARA KWARUSAPE WAKANZI TASVIKA CHIYENDA.
WAKABVA WANO KWIRA MUCHIKOMO CHINONZI RUUNZE, KUBVA PANZVIMBO IYI BABA JOHANNE WAKA TANGA KUNETSWA NE WANHU WATEMA ZVICHI YENDA MBERI.
SAKA BABA JOHANNE MUDAMBUDZIKO RAWO KAZHINJI WAYIZOTI KO HAMA DZANGU WANHU WATEMA IYO IMBA YA KUSHI INOWE NDIYO YANDAKA TUMWA KUZO NUNURA ZVAYIRI IYO YANDI MUKIRA?
INI NDAKANZI NDIZO CHENJEDZA IMBA YA KUSHI KUYITIRA KUTI WANAMATE WAREGE CHAKAYIPA, WANAKE WATIZE HASHA DZA TENZI DZIRI KUWUYA, IRO PASI ROSE IRI RAKOMBWA NE MOTO IRI PASI RAWA KUGUMA.
ZVINO MADZISHE AYA ARI MUNYIKA INO, WARAMBA RUPONESO WARAMBA RUGARE WACHIDA SATAN.
TENZI WAKA YIMBA SE RWIYO, TENZI WAKAZO FAMBA NZVIMBO ZHINJI WACHI PARIDZA NDURAMO NE KUCHENJEDZA WANHU KUTI WAZIWE KUTI PASI RAWA KUGUMA UYE KUTI WATIZE HASHA DZA MWARI DZIRI KUWUYA.

WAYITI BABA WANGU HAWADI HAWO MUNHU ANO SHANDISA MISHONGA KANA KUPINGA MISHA, KANA MADIWISI, KUROYA KANA KUBVISA DZI NHUMBU.

WAKATI WASVIKA PANENGUWO, WARI MUDUNHU RASHE NENGUWO KWAKA UNZWA MURUME AYINZI MATEU MUNDERE, MUNHU UYU AKANGE AROYIWA ZVE KUYITA CHIBIBI KWE MAKORE MAZHINJI ZHINJI CHIRI CHIBIBI.
ZVINO HAMA DZAKE DZAKANZWA KUTI KUNE MUNHU WA MWARI ARI KUYITA ZVI NANARA KUPONESA WARWERE KUSVINUDZA MAPOFU MUZITA RA MWARI,
WAKABVA WATAKURA HAMA YAWO MUCHI RHEYI WAKA SVIKA NAYE PAYIWE NA BABA JOHANNE.

IZVO BABA JOHANNE WAKA NZWA MUTAWURO WAKA TAWURWA NEWANHU AWA WAKA SIMUKA WAKA YENDA PA MURWERE WAKA SVIKO MUKWAZISA WACHITI “MAKADINI NEKURWARA KWATIRI KUSUMWA”
MURWERE AKATI NDINONGO DARO HANGU CHANGAMIRE INI NDATAMBUDZIKA.
BABA JOHANNE WAKA BATA MAKUMBO EMURWERE UYU, WAKA TAWURA WACHITI “ZVINO IYE MWARI AKA NGONDITUMI REYIKO PANO PASI ACHI ZIWA KUTI PANE MADZIMAMBO ANOPA WANHU MATAMBUDZIKO AKA DAYI?”
KUNGO DARO CHETE MURWERE AKANZWA KURIRA MAKUMBO AKE ZVICHI KWAKWANUKA KUNGE MAKWATI AKA WOMA ARI KUKWAKWANUKA, MURWERE AKA SIMUKA , ASIMUKA AKA DAYIDZIRA ACHITI “NDASIMUKA”

RIKAWAWUDZA KUTI KUNE MUNHU ARI KUPFUURA NEKUMUSORO UKO NDI SEKURU WAKO. WARIKUENDA KUNDOTSVAKA MUNHU ANGABATSIRA MUDZIMAYI WAWO KUTI APONE NGEKUTI ZVANETSA.

TAKABVA MUMASOWE MA GANDANZARA, IYE BABA JOHANNE WAKATI “ZVANZI NDIYENDE KU MOZAMBIQUE NDINO WUDZA WANHU WARIYO KUTI NGAWA NAMATE MWARI NGUWA YAPERA ,MWARI AKUDA KUTONGA NYIKA YAKE”.
“NDIWAWUDZA KUTI HUMAMBO HURIMO HWAPERA ,MWARI WAKUPA NYIKA KUWANHU WAYO,” TAKANGE TISINA NEMARI YESE TAKA FAMBA NETSOKA TAKASVIKA PAMUSHA PAGWENA NGURUWE PAYIWA NE CHECHI YE ROMA,
PAYIWA NEMUFUNDISI WEMUNHU MUTEMA, PAKASVIKA MUPURISA AKABVA KU HOFISI ISU TESE TAKANGE TISINA MATSAMBA,
ZVINO IYE AKATI MUSATAWURE ,MUPURISA AKA TAWURA NEMUFUNDISI AKARAMBA ,AKATI USAWA BATE HANDIDI KUTI MUWABTIRE PANO NEKUTI WATI WARI KUPARIDZA VHANGERI RA MWARI.
ASI ISIMBA RA MWARI RAKAYITA IZVO NEKUTI MAPUTUKEZI WANHU WAYIWA NEHUTSINYE KUWANHU WATEMA,TAKA TENDA MWARI,
BABA JOHANNE WAKATI HAWAMBOTI BATE BA, MWARI HAASATI ADA KUTI TIBATWE, GARAYI HENYU!”
TAKABVA IPAPO TIKAYENDA ,BABA JOHANNE WAKA TUMA WAKOMANA WAYIRI PACHITESHI CHINONZI MASEKESI, CHINHU CHIKURU CHAKA YITIKA APO WAKANGE WANDO TENGA HOWE WAKABVA WAWONEKWA NEMUPURISA.

IZVO KWAKA YEDZA NENGUWA DZA 10 A,M. TAKAWONA WARUME AWO TAYIWA NAWO WONDIBVUNZA KUTI BABA JOHANNE ZVAATI NDOYENDA , WA WUDZEYI KUTI TAWA KUDZOKERA KUMUSHA.
IWO HONAYI WANHU WAKUCHEMA WASIKANA NAWA KOMANA, TAKA WUDZA BABA JOHANNE WAKATI “ZVAKANAKA NGAWA DZOKERE ZVAWO”.

IWO BABA JOHANNE WAKATI CHIMUPEREKEDZA HAKO ASI KANA WAYENDA NAYE UNOBVA WANDO DZOKA UGONDI YIGIRA WAPOROFITI ,NDIKATI ZVAKANAKA. TADZOKA MURHODESIA
TAKASIMUKA TOPINDA MUNZIRA RWENDO RWEMA ZUWA MASHANU KURARA PANZIRA. TAKAZO SVIKA PASANGANO RE GANDANZARA ISU TAKAWUYA TAWA KURWARA TESE TIRI WATATU ,DANIEL TAKA MUSIYA PA MUTARE.
IYE BABA JOHANNE TAKA PARADZANA MUTUNHU E MELSETER OYENDA CHIPINGE ANA SAMSON MATIVERA NEWASIKANA WAYIRI WANA SARA NA ERIKA MASUNDA.
TAKASVIKA PASANGANO RE GANDANZARA, NDAKAWA WUDZA KUTI TADZOKA BABAJOHANNE TAPARADZANA NAYE,
WANHU WESE WAKADZOKA ASI NDAMUSIYA ASINA MUPOROFITI IYE WATI ENDA UNDONDOTORERE WAPOROFITI, NEKUTI BASA IRI RINODA KUFAMBA TINE WAPOROFITI.
NDAKA PFUWURA NDIKA SVIKA MU SANGANO RE DEWEDZO, NDIKA SUMA KUFAMBA KWANGU KWESE NEMATAMBUDZIKO ESE AYO TAKAWONA.
ZVINO MWARI ANODA WANHU WANE SIMBA, INI NDAKATI BABA JOHANNE NDAKAMUSIYA AYINA SAMSON MATIVERA NEWASIKANA WAYIRI WATAKABVA NAWO MUSANGANO RE PAGANDANZARA WACHI YENDA KUCHIPINGE.
WARUME WESE NEWAKOMANA NEWASIKANA WAKA DZOKERA KUMISHA YAWO, BABA JOHANNE WAKA SARA EGA MUSANGO MUNYIKA ISINA HAMA, NDIPEYI WAPOROFITI NDIDZOKERE NAWO.
SANGANO RAKANDIPA MUPOROFITI JEFT NEDEWEDZO. KUBVA DEWEDZO KUYENDA KU CHIPINGE RWENDO RWESE URWO TAYI FAMBA NETSOKA, TAKABVA DEWEDZO TIKA YENDA KWA GANDANZARA NA MUPOROFITI JEFT,

TAKARARA PANZIRA TAKAZONO SVIKA ZUWA RADOKA NOMUSI WECHINA KUSENI. MANGWANA WACHO CHISHANU WANHU WAKAUYA MU MASOWE ZVINO WABATI WEBASA WESANGANO REKWA MASIYAKUDYA WAKA KUMBIRA KUTI TODAWO UYU TIYENDE NAYE TODZOKA NAYE MANGWANA, WAKA YENDA WAKA DZOKA MANGWANA.

IZVO WAKA SVIKA WOTI MUKOMA INI HANDICHAYENDI BA MWOYO WANGU WAKATAMBUDZIKA KUTI RWENDO RWAKADAYI NDINOYENDA NANI. NDAKAZVI PIRA KUYENDA NDEGA, MWOYO WAKATI MWARI MUBATSIRI WANGU UNONDI PEREKEDZA DAKARA NDISVIKE.
IYE ZVE WAKANDI TUMA UNOWA NENI, ZVINO SANGANO GANDANZARA RAKATI CHIGARA SVONDO RINO WOZOYENDA NE SVONDO TAKUPA MUMWE ANOKUPEREKEDZA .
WAKANDIPA BEN CHIWEZA IYE WAKATI NDINOYENDA TAKAGARA KUDAKARA CHISHANU ZUWA RADOKA, BEN AKATI UDZAYI MUVHANGERI CYPREN NEDEWEDZO KUTI HANDICHAYENDE BA NAYE NDAPINGIDZIKA.
ASI MWOYO WANGU WAKATI WANHU WANO NYENGEDZA,INGA DAYI NDAKA ENDA HANGU NE SVONDO, NDAKABVA HANGU NDIKANO RARA PAKAPAKO. === PAGE 70 ===
KUZOTI NENGUWA DZA 9 MANHERU, WANHU WAYI DAYIDZIRWA KUZOYIMBA ,WAKA YIMBA MWEYA UKA DZIKA UKABATA WANHU WESE, ZVINO UMWE MAYI ANE MWEYA WEKUDZIDZISA WAKABVUNZA KUTI MUVHANGERI ARIPI, MUTSVAGEYI.
NDAKA DAYIDZWA ZVIKANZI MUVHANGERI USATAMBUDZIKE HAKO BA, MWARI WAGADZIRA RWENDO RWAKO, WAPUWA WANA 4, AWO WUNO YENDA NAWO WASARURWA WA MWARI EGA.

TAKAFAMBA TIKA TAMBUDZIKA TICHISHAYA CHEKUDYA, ZVAKA TAWURWA MUNA MATEO 10V 9, LUKA 10 V4.

TAKASVIKA PASAWE PAYIWAKWA BECHINAFU BRIDGE, IZVO TAKANGE TAGARA MUZASI MERWIZI TAFA NENZARA PAKASVIKA MUMWE MURUME WECHI ZION ,WAKAWANA TIGEREPO,
AKATI INGA MUNENGE WANHU WANONAMATA WANI, NDIKATI IDI, WAKATI MUNONAMATA KUPI? NDIKATI HAMUNA KUMBONZWA HERE KUTI SALISBURY KWAKA MUKA MUNHU WAMWARI?
WAKATI TAKAMUNZWA AKABVA ATI NGATICHIYENDEYI KUMBA, NDIKATI ZVAKANAKA, NDIKATI ASI HAMUSATI MAMUNZWA HERE ARI KUNO KUCHIPINGE ,NDIYE WATIRI KUTSVAKA!

WAKAPINDURA ACHITI HATISATI TAMUNZWA BA , WAKABVA WATIBIKRA SADZA, NDIWO MUSI WATAKADYA SADZA KUBVA KWATAKYITA KWA GANDANZARA, TAKAFUMA KUBVAPO TODZIKA NORWIZI RUNONZI SAWE TAKAPEDZA MAZUWA MAYIRI TICHIFAMBA TARASIKA.
NDIPO NDAKATI NDINO WONA KUTI TARASIKA, TANYANYA KUDZIKA NGATINAMATEYI TIVHUNZE MWARI ATIRATIDZE.
MWEYA WAKATI BABA JOHANNE TAMUSIYA MUMASHURE NGATIDZOKEREYI, TAKABVA TADZOKA.
ASI NZARA TAKAPONA NEMANGWARARA ZVINO BARWA NEMURARA ZVAKATI PONESA, ASI MUSI IWOWO TAKAFUMOMUKA TODZOKERA MUMASHURE TAKANDORARA PAMUSHA UYA WEMU ZION.
IZVO TAKAMUKA PO NDAKA WONA KUTI PFUNGWA DZANGU DZATAMBUDZIKA NDAKATI IMI WAMWE WANGU CHIFANOYENDAYI HENYU NDICHAMBO NAMATA.
DZAYIWA NGUWA DZA 10 MANGWANANI, NDAKANAMATA NDIKANZWA IZWI BEDZI RAKATI MUCHAMUWANA NDOKUBVA NDATI AMEN.
IZVO NDAKASIMUKA NDAKASVIKA PAYIWA NEWAMWE WANGU, NDAKAWANA WAGERE WAKAWONA SEKUNGE NDAKUDA KUWATIZA. WASIKANA WAKATI WAMUVHANGERI ASI MAWAKUDA KUTITIZA ,ISU TINOGO YENDEPIKO TINGAFIRE MUSANGO.
WAPEDZA KUTAWURA PAKABVA PASVIKAMUMWE MURUME MUTEMA ANE MHUNO DZAKAFENGUKA. NDAKA VHUNZA KUTI BABA MUNO ZIWAWO HERE PAMUSHA PA BASKITI, AKABVA ATI EHE NDAKABVAPO NEZURO.

IYE WAKATI MUKABVA PANO MUNORARA PANZIRA ,MUKAWONA KUNE MHUTE MUSABUDE MOZOTI KANA MHUTE YAPERA. NEKUTI PAMBERI APO PAKAMBO RUMWA MUNHU NESHUMBA.

INI NDAKAWONA GUMBO RAYO PAYA TSIKA YAKANDOTSAUKA CHETE. NDIKATI MWARI ANESU, IZVO TAYIFAMBA MWOYO WANGU WAIWA KUNA MWARI, TAKA SVIKA MANGWANANI NENGUWA DZA 9 A.M.

ASI KANA MUSIKANA AKA SVIBA(AKA POMBA) , ANOGARA PASI, MUKOMANA WOMIRA, KANA ARI MUKOMANA AKA SVIBA (AKA POMBA), ANOGARA PASI, MUSIKANA WOMIRA, SANGANO ROSE RINOBVA RAZIWISWA CHIKONZERO CHASAKISA KUTI MUMWECHETE PAKATI PEWAYIRI AWA ADAYIDZIRWE AKA GARA PASI, MUKURU ANOWA CHATISA ANOBVA ATI KUSANGANO “MUSIKANA ARI PANO ASI CHIREMA” IZVI ZVINENGE ZVICHIREWA KUTI AKA SVIBA, KUMUKOMANA NDIZVO ZVIMWECHETE.

MUSIKANA AKA CHENA AKA MISWA PAMBERI PESANGANO PAKUCHATA KWAKE ,MWANA WAKE WEDANGWE, ANOZO CHENURWA KUTI APINDE MUMASOWE, KANA PAKUCHATA KWAKE ,MUSIKANA ASINA KUMIRA PAMBERI PESANGANO, MWANA WAKE WEDANGWE HAABVUMIRWI KUCHENURWA, ANO BUDA MUBANDA AKA DARO,

MUSAZO TAMBE MITAMBO YECHIFAMBI PAMICHATO YEWANA WENYU, HAZVI TENDERWI , MUNOZO SIYA MADHIMONI MUYIMBA YEWANA ,MADHIMONI ANOZO SUNGA ZVIBEREKO ZVEWANA WENYU, UYE WANA WENYU WANOZO BEREKA WANA WANE MISIKANZWA, WASINGA TERERI, UYE WACHIZO KUTAMBUDZAYI IMI WABEREKI WAWO.

HAZVI TENDERWI KUTI KANA MUCHIRATIDZA MWANASIKANA KUNE MURUME WAKE, KUBVISWE MARI YEKUTENDA MUROMO WATEZVARA, HAZVIDIWI, ASI MUKWASHA ANO BVUMIRWA KUGARA ACHI YENDA KUMBA KWA TEZVARA KUNO WOMBERA, NDIKO KUTENDA KUNO DIKWA NA MWARI ,BABA JOHANNE WAKACHIYISA MUFANANIDZO WAWA OLIVER MUNATSI AWO WAWAKAPA BASA REKUGARA WACHINO WOMBERA MADZITEZVARA AWO.

HAZVITENDERWI KUPA MWANASIKANA WEMUNHU PAMUWIRI ,MUNO FANIRA KUTI, KANA MUSIKANA IYEYO ASUNGUNUKA ,TORAYI MWANA IYEYO ACHINGOBVA MUKUSUNGUNUKWA, ACHEKWA RUKUVHUTE ,ASATI AYAMWA MUKAKA WAAMAYI WAKE, MUNOMUPA MUKOMANA WACHO , NDIKO KUPEDZA CHITEMA ICHI,
HAZVI BVUMIRWI KUTI MURUME AFAMBE ACHISIA MUKADZI WAKE KWENGUWA REFU, KANA KWEMWEDZI CHAYIWO, AZVITENDERWI,
HAZVI TENDERWI KUTI MUKADZI WEMUNHU ADOKERWE NEZUWA ASATI ASVIKA PAMUSHA WEMURUME WAKE.
HAZVITENDERWI KUTI MUNHUKADZI ANO TENGESEREKUNZVIMBO DZIRI KURE KWEANO RARAKO ASIRI PAMUSHA PEMURUME WAKE, KUYITA KWAKA DARO HAKU TENDERWI MUSANGANO RINO .

HAZVI TENDERWI KUROORA KANA KUROORWA NEMUNHU ASINGA NAMATI MUSANGANO RINO, MUSIKANA ANO NAMATA ,AKA ROORWA NEMUNHU ASINGA NAMATE MUSANGANO RINO ,BABA WAKE WANO MISWA KUNAMATA KUSVIKIRA MWANA WAWO ADZOKA MUMASOWE.
MUKOMANA AKA ROORA MUKADZI ASINGANAMATI MUSANGANO RINO , MUKOMANA IYEYO , ANO DZINGWA MUMASOWE ,ANOZO BVUMIRWA KUPINDA MUMASOWE KANA ARAMBANA NEMUKADZI IYEYO.
WAKURU WAKA BVUNZA BABA JOHANNE WACHITI, “IZVO MATI MWANASIKANA HAABVUMIRWI KUROORWA NEMUNHU ASINGA NAMATE MUSANGANO RINO ,KOO AKA ROORWA NEMUNAMTI ,MURUME WAKE ADZOKERA MUNYIKAPANOYITWA SEYI?”

BABA JOHANNE WAKATI “KANA MURUME WAKE AKATI HAACHADI KUNAMATA ,IWE BABA UNO TORA MWANASIKANA WAKO NEWANA WAKE WOSE, USAZOSIYE KANA MUMWECHETE === PAGE 84 === ZVAKE, NEKUTI HAANA KUBVISIRA PFUMA KUNZE KWEKUNAMATA CHETE!”

WAKURU WAKATI “KO KANA NDAKADYA PFUMA YAKE?” BABA JOHANNE WAKATI, “KUSAKA NDAKATI MUSAZO ROODZE WANASIKANA WENYU NE PFUMA” BABA WANGU WARI KUDENGA WAKA RAMBIDZA PFUMA NEKUTI WANODA MUNHU WESE ANAMATE.
WAKURU WAKA BVUNZA KUTI, “KO MUNHU ANE MWANA WAKE ARI NZVIMBO DZIRI KURE, ANO YITWA SEYI? KANA AWUYA ANE MUDZIMAYI ASINGA NAMATE” KANA KURWARA ARI IKOKO KUSINA WANAMATI WANGAMU NAMATIRE?”
BABA JOHANNE WAKATI, “TORAYI WANA WENYU MUGARE NAWO WACHIITA MABASA ENYU EMAWOKO”
WAKURU WAKATI “KO WANA AWA, WAKA RAMBA NEKUDA KWEKUTI WAAKUDA KUSEENZA KUWARUNGU, TINO WAYITA SEYI?”

BABA JOHANNE WAKATI, “BABA WANGU WAKANDI TUMA, HAWADI KUTI MUNHU ATONGWE NEMWANA WAKE, MWANA ANO FANIRA KUKUDZA WABEREKI WAKE, NEKUWATERERA. KANA MWANA WAKO ARAMBA KUNZWA MAZWI AKO, MUKOMANA KANA MUSIKANA, PARADZANA NAYE MWANA IYEYO, KANA ARAMBA KUNAMATA MUYITE MUTORWA, ABVE PAMUSHA PAKO, USAZODYE PFUMA YAKE, KANA TIKI CHAYIYO USAZO YITAMBIRE.

ZVAWAKA VHURA WAKA TERERA NHAU DZAYI TAWURWA IPAPO, DZAYITI, KWAWE NENYIKA INONZI GHANA YATORWA YAWE NEMUTUNGAMIRIRI WEMUNHU MUTEMA ANONZI KWAME NKRUMAH.
MUPARIDZI ENOUCH AKABVA AYENDA KUNO SUMA KUNA BABA JOHANNE KUTI KWAWE NENYIKA INONZI GHANA YATORWA NEMUNHU MUTEMA.
BABA JOHANNE WACHIBVA WATI NDIZVO ZVIYA ZVANDAKA KUWUDZAYI KUTI NDAWUYA KUZO SUNGURA AFRIKA NDICHIYI BVISA KUWARUNGU NDICHIYIPA KUWARIDZI WAYO WATEMA. === PAGE 110 ===

MUVHANGERI TITOS ANO PINDURA ACHITI, “NDAZVINZWA ZVAMURI KUTAWURA, NDOCHIKU PINDURA ZVAWURI KUNDI TSANANGURIRA IZVI NDINE MUBVUNZO MUMWECHETE”
“NEKUTI KANA NDAWA KUKUPINDURA PAMITAWURO YAKO HANDIDI KUTI UZOTI AAH IYI YAKUDA KUTI NDIBVUNZE WO MUMWE ARI MUKURU KWANDIRI”
“NDAWA NDIRI KUDA KUTI UGONDIPINDURA PAZVESE” IYE AKATI “URI KUDA KUVHUNZA KUTIYIKO?” ZVIKANZI “KANA NDAWA KUKUVHUNZA HANDIDI KUTI UZOTI IYI YAWAKUDA WAKURU, NDIRI KUDA KUTI TOBVA TAPEDZERANA”
AKATI.”NDIZVO ZVAWURI KUTAWURA” ZVIKANZI “EHE , NDATI INI HANDINGA KUTAWURIRE ZVANDIRI KUDA KUKUVHUNZA, IWE WOZOTI IYI YAKUDA WAKURU KWANDIRI”
ZVIKANZI “ZVAKANAKA ZVICHA GADZIRWA NEKUTI KANA YAWANHAWU YAKADAYI YAKUTODA WAKURU KWANDIRI” MUVHANGERI TITOS AKATI, “IWAWO NDIWO WANDIRI KUDA WASINA MUMWE MUNHU WAWANO BVUNZA, TICHIBVA TAPEDZERANA”
NHAWU IYI YAKANO SUMWA GORVENER QUINTON, IYE AKATI “CHIGADZIRIRAYI TONOSANGANA NAWO KU PARLIMENT”
MA AMBERSODER OSE AYIWE MU RHODESIA AKA KOKWA KUTI WAGOWAPO PADARE IRORO,NEKUTI IWO WANA MUVHANGERI TITOS WAYITO TORWA SEHWUMAMBO HWABVA SOUTH AFRICA,

ZUWA RAKA SVIKA REKU PARLIMENT. ZVAWAKANGE WASVIKA MUDARE IRORO . GORVENER QUINTON AKA SIMUKA AKA SUMA WANHU WESE WAYIWE WARIMO MUDARE IRI ;NEZVIGARO ZVAWO MUHUMENDE NEMA AMBOSODOR NEDZI NYIKA DZAWO, AKA PEDZISIRA NAIYE AKATI “INI NDINI MR QUINTON”
IWO WANA MUVHANGERI TITOS MUCHUCHU WAKA SUMAWO MAMIRIRO AWO KUTI UYU NDINHINGI KUSVIKIRA ACHITI INI NDINI JACK SITHOLE.

ZVIKANZI NA MR QUINTON “NGATI CHIPINDAYI MUNHAWU YEDU, NDAKANZWA KUTI IWE JACK SITHOLE URI KUNDIDA KUTI TIWONANE, SAKA NDIYO NHAWU YANDIRI KUDA KUTI TICHITANGA KUTI PAMUTAWURO WAWURI KUDA KUWONANA NENI NDEWEKUTIYI?:”
MUVHANGERI TITOS ANO PINDURA ACHITI “INI HANDINA KUMBO TAWURA IZWI REKUTI NDIRI KUDA KUWONANA NEWE INI”
“INI NDIRI KUVHUNZA KUTI MUNHU AKANDI SHEWEDZA KUBVA KUNYIKA YANDI GERE NDIYANI ? UYE AKANDI SHEWEDZEREYI, INI HANDISI KUTSVAGA IWE”
ZVIKANZI NA MR QUINTON, “ZVECHOKWADI NGATI CHIPINDAYI MUNHAWU” AKATI “JACK SITHOLE TISU TAKAKU SHEWEDZA, NHAWU YATAKAKU SHEWEDZERA NDEYEKUTI,
“TAKA TUMA WANHU KUTI WAZOKU WONAYI KUTI MURI WANHU WAKA BUDA MUNYIKA INO YE RHODESIA HERE, ZVINO WANHU WEDU WATAKA TUMA KWAMURI WAKANO KUWONAYI KUTI ZVEDI MURI WANHU WENYIKA INO YE RHODESIA,
SAKA HUWANDU HWAMUYI NAHWO KUNYIKA IKOKO, KWAKA WONEKWA KUTI MUNO FANIRA KUTI MUBVE MUNYIKA IYOYO MUDZOKE MUNYIKA INOYI YE RHODESIA , NEKUDA KWEZVI KONZERO ZVIZHINJI” ACHIBVA APEDZA KUTAWURA.

ZVIKANZI NAWA MUVHANGERI TITOS MUCHUCHU, “NDICHIKU PINDURA HERE?” MR QUINTON AKATI, “PINDURA” WAKATI “CHANDIRI KUDA KUTANGA NDAZIWA KUTI, CHITURU CHAWAKA GARA NEMBATYA DZAWAKA PFEKA DZINO REWEYI?” IYE AKATI, “CHINO REWA KUTI NDIRI MAMBO” WAKATI “KO MBATYA?” IYE AKATI “DZINO REWA KUTI NDRI MAMBO”
MUVHANGERI TITOS AKATI “CHII CHINONZI MAMBO?” MR QUINTON AKATI “MUCHENGETEDZI WEWANHU KUTI WAGARE ZVAKANAKA” MUVHANGERI TITOS WAKATI “ZVIRI IDI ZVAWURI === PAGE 114 === KUTAWURA”

“ASI KWANDIRI INI HANDI DARO, INI NDIRI KUTI URI MACHISI!!!, INO TUNGIDZA MISHA YEWAMWE WANHU ICHI PARADZA.” WAMWE WABATI WAKA PEREKEDZA WAMUVHANGERI TITOS WAKA TANGA KUTYA WACHITI “ISU TICHA DZOKERA HERE, KANA KUTI TICHAWA CHIMIRO CHIPI” NEKUTI KUNZE KWE PARLIMENT KWAYIWE KWAKA CHENGETEDZWA ZVAKANYANYA NEMA SOJA NEMAPURISA.
WARUNGU WESE WAKANYARARA KUTI ZIII, MR QUINTON AKA RUMA HAKE PENZURA ,PAKA GARWA KANGUWA PAKA NYARARWA.

“WANHU WANGU ZVAWAKABVA MUNO WACHI YENDA ZAKA, MAKAWA BATA MUKAWA ROWA ZVAKAYIPA MUKAWA TORERA ZVITUPA , WANHU WANGU ZVAWAKA ROHWA, INI NDAKATI HEYI!! NDOYITA SEYI?

NDAKAZOTI ININI MANJE , NGANDICHIKU BVUNZAYI IMI HURUMENDE, NDIKATI NDAZVIWONA ,ZVAYITIKA ,ASI NDAKUBVUNZA WO KUTI KO! CHIYI CHAYITA KUTI HURUMENDE INO CHENGETEDZA WANHU , INOTI CHENGETEDZA TESE TIRI PASI PE HURUMENDE’
‘ISVIKE PAKUROWA WANHU WANGU ZVAKADAYI! ISVIKE PAKUTAMBUDZA WANHU WANGU ZVAKADAYI!

‘ASI NDIRI KUTENDA KUNA MWARI NDAWA INI NEWE TIRI WAPENYU ,DAYI KURI KUTI HAWUSISIPO PANYIKA ZVE HAPANA WANDAYI BVUNZANA NAYE NEKUTI WANENGE WAWAKUTI IYI NHAWU HATIYI ZIWI,

NEKUTI NDIMI MURI KUTI TONGA, IMI MUKATI ISU HAPANA CHATINGA MBOYITI TINOTO TEDZA ZVIRI KUTAWURWA NEMADZIMAMBO ENYIKA’

MUPOROFITI BASA RAKE NDERE KUYAMBIRA ,KUCHENJEDZA MUNHU KUTI IWE WAKUFA ASI CHAKUKUWURAYA NDECHAKATI ,PAKO UNENGE WAPEDZA ,KANA ADZOKA PACHITEMA ICHOCHO WAMU BATSIRA KUPONESA MWEYA WAKE, ASI AKA RAMBIRA PACHITEMA ICHOCHO MWEYA WAKE AHWUZO BVUNZWI PAMUSORO PAKO.

MUPARIDZI BASA RAKE NDERE KUDZIDZISA APOROFITWA KUTI ZVATAWURWA NEMUPOROFITI WAZVINZWA HERE ,ZVANZI REGERA CHITEMA ICHI CHAKUKUWURAYA. MUPARIDZI UNENGE UCHI RAYIRA MWANA WEMUNHU, UCHIMUWONESA KUYIPA KWECHITEMA CHAABATIRWA NEMUPOROFITI, NEKWA CHAWE KUMUSVITSA.

BABA JOHANNE WANOTI, MUNHU WESE ANO FANIRA KUGARA AKA CHENA PAMBERI PA MWARI ,NEKUTI MAGUMO EHUPENYU HWAKE APANA ANOUZIWA ,MUNHU WESE UNO FANIRA KUGARA UCHIZIWA KUTI UCHAFA, ASI NGUWA CHETE NDIYO YAWUSI NGAZIWI ,NGUWA IRI KUNA MWARI ,NDIYE ANOZIWA NGUWA YAANO TORA NAYO MWEYA WEMUNHU ,HAKUNA KANA CHISIKWA CHIRI KUDENGA KUMUSORO CHAKA PIHWA RUZIWO IRWORWO.

SAKA ZVINODA KUTI MUNHU WESE AKWANIRWE NENGUWA IYOYO ASINA CHITEMA CHAASINA KUTAWURA KUWA BATI WEMABASA ACHIRI PANO PASI, NEKUTI PASI PANO NDIPO PANO REWURURWA ZVITADZO ZVEMWANA WEMUNHU, UYE NDIPO ZVE PANE RUTONGO NEKUREGERERWA ZVITADZO ZVE MWANA WE MUNHU ,KUDENGA HAKUNA IZVOZVO , KUDENGA IDZVIMBO YEKUPIMWA KWEMABASA AKA BATWA NEMWANA WEMUNHU ACHIRI MUPASI ,KUNAKA KWAWO KANA KUYIPA KWAWO,

KANA UCHINGE WAFA USINA KUTAWURA MHOSVA DZAWAKA YITA PANO PASI, MUNHU USA FUNGE KUTI UCHANO DZITAWURIRA KUDENGA KANA WAFA, NDIKO WOZO SUNUNGURWA IKOKO ,HAZVIDARO! MUNHU KANA UYINE CHITEMA CHAWAKA ITA PANO PANYIKA ,UKA CHITAWURA KUWA BATI WEMABASA, WOTONGWA, WOPIHWA CHIRANGO, CHIRANGO ICHOCHO UNO FANIRA KUCHISENZEERA URI PAMUTEMO KUSVIKIRA MWEYA WAKO UBVISWE PANYIKA USINA ZVE CHIMWE CHITEMA CHAWAKA ITA.

MUNHU USA FUNGE KUTI ZVAUNO NAMATA MWARI MUZITA RATENZI BABA JOHANNE NDICHANO KUREWERERA, INI HANDIZO NENERERI MUNHU, NEKUTI RINENGE RISIRI ZUWA REKUBVUNZWA KANA KUTONGWA KWEZVITEMA ZVEMUNHU KWETE, ASI KUTI RINENGE RAWE ZUWA REKU SAINIRWA KWEMA BASA AKA BATWA PANO PASI CHETE,

ZVINENGE ZVAKA MIRA KUDAI ,MOSES ANENGE ARI PARUTIWI AKA BATA BUKU REMUTEMO, ACHIWU DAIDZIRA ,ENOCH WECHINOMWE ANENGE AYINE MUDZIMU UNOYERA ACHI VHENEKERA MABASA AKA BATWA NE WANA WEWANHU PASI PANYIKA, KUTANGISA ZUWA RAWAKA TANGA KUZIWA CHAKANAKA NE CHAKA YIPA ,KUSVIKIRA PAZUWA REKUFA KWAKO, PANENGE PASINA KUHWANDIKA IPAPO.

JESU ANENGE AKA MIRIRIRA WAYA WAKA REWURURA ZVITADZO ZVAWO WACHIRI MUPASI PANYIKA, WAYA WAKA ZIWA KUTI WATADZA, WAKABVA WAMHANYIRA KUWA PARIDZI WEGA, WASINA KUBATWA NEMUPOROFITI KANA KUREWURISWA NEKURWARA KWETE, ASI WAKA ZIWA KUTI INI NDATADZIRA MWARI, WAKANDO PUTSIKA PAMBERI PEWABATI WEMABASA, AWA NDIWO WANENGE WAKA MIRIRIRWA NA JESU.

MUKAPA BABA JOHANNE MARI IYI VANOFA , YAKA DEKETERWA KU N’ANGA, VAKA YENDA NE MARI IYI NDIVA MUVHANGERI SAPRENI NA MUPARIDZI JOJO MARONDERA NA MATONGO .
NDIWO VANGA VARI PA N’ANGA IPAPO, VACHITI BABA JOHANNE NGAWAFE, SAKA PAKASVIKA TELEGRAM IYI YAKA PUHWA MUPARIDZI KRIPEN BOKA, HAANA KUYI RATIDZA BABA JOHANNE.
KUDZAMARA MUPARIDZI ENOCH VACHO ASVIKA, ZVAAKA SVIKA KENYA ,MUPARIDZI ENOCH AKAPA MUPARIDZI KRIPEN BOKA MARI IYI KUTI APE BABA JOHANNE MARI IYA YAKANGA YABVA KUN’ANGA.
BABA JOHANNE VAKAYI TAMBIRA NAMAWOKO AWO VAKA VHURA ENVELOP YAKANGA INE MARI IPAPO MADZISO A BABA JOHANNE AKA PINDUKA KUTI RIMWE ROTARISA KUDENGA RIMWE ROTARISA PASI.
IPAPO NDAKA DAYIDZA WAKURU VAYINGE VARIPO KUTI VAUYE VESE VAONE ZVAYITA BABA JOHANNE,
APO VAKA SVIKA VAKA UNGANA NDAKATI VONAI ZVAITA BABA JOHANNE IZVI !
APO VESE VAKA SVIKA VESE VACHITI ZVAYITA SEYI?
INI NDAKATI HAPANA ZVANDINOZIWA NAZVO O NDIMUPARIDZI KRIPEN BOKA ANO ZVIZIVA. IPAPO VAKURU VESE VAKA BUDA VAKA SHATIRWA ,VAKA YENDA KUNO YITA DARE ASI HAVANA KUZO DZOKA.
ZVE ZVEKARE ZUWA RACHO IRORO BABA JOHANNE VAKATI NDAKUDA KUYENDA KU TOWN ,VAKATI NDIPEYI BHURUKWA REGRAY NE SHETI NE CAP, VAKABVA WAPFEKA ASI MAZISO AWO AKANGA ASATI ACHINJA.
NDIPO TAKA SIMUKA KUPINDA MUKATI MEMBA ,APO TAKA SVIKA PAMUSIWO GUMBO RAWO RERUDYI RAKA ROWERA PA PURANGA RAKANGA RIRIPO VACHIBVA WAPUTSIKA.
IPAPO NDIPO PAWAKATI NADAKUWARA NDAGUKA MUSANA, TAKA SIMUDZA BABA JOHANNE IPAPO PAMWE NE MADZIMAYI VAKATI HANDICHA GONI KUFAMBA.
TAKAWA PINZA MUMOTA ,NDIPO WAKATI DAYIDZAYI MUPARIDZI KRIPEN BOKA,
APO AKA SVIKA BABA JOHANNE WAKATI ENOCH ARIPI?
ENOCH AKABVA AWUYA ZVIKANZI DAYIDZAYI NCUMALO NE MOTA AWUYE, MUPARIDZI ENOCH AKANZI AGARE KUMBERI KWA DRIVER INI ELIAS NA KRIPEN BOKA TAKA GARA MUMASHURE NA BABA JOHANNE WARI PAKATI PEDU.
NCUMALO AKANGE ACHI TWERA MUMASHURE MEDU TAKA SVIKA PA GARAGE ,BABA JOHANNE WAKATI ENOCH NA KRIPEN CHIENDAYI MUNO CHINJA MARI IYI, MUKACHINJA MOBVA MADZOKERA KUMBA TOSANGANA IKOKO,
ISU TAKA RAMBA TICHI YENDA MBERI KU TOWN ,NDIPO BABA JOHANNE VAKATI HANDICHAGONI KUFAMBA NDINODA KUKURATIDZA MUNE ZVINHU ZVANDIRI KUDA UZOTENGE ,

TAKA YENDA KUNDO RATIDZWA , TAWA KUDZOKERA NDIPO TAKAONA ENOCH NA KRIPEN VAKATI MIRIRA PATAKAWA SIYA WARIPO, VACHITI TAMIRA NEMARI KUTI TIKUPEYI MUTENGE ZVINHU ,IYI NDIYO MARI IYA YAKANZI MUSAZOPE BABA JOHANNE.

MWEYA MUTSVENE UNOBVA KUNA BABA WANGU UNO TSINHIRA MITEMO YANDAKABVA NAYO KUDENGA, HAWUYISI MIMWE MITEMO PAMUSORO PEMIMWE MITEMO YANDAKA RAYIRA SANGANO, MWEYA MUTSVENE WAMWARI UNO REMEKEDZA WABATI WEMABASA .

MWEYA MUTSVENE WA BABA WANGU UNO KUMBIRA WABATI WEMABASA PAYINE ZVAWATUMWA NA TENZI , IMI WANHU WANO SHANDISWA NA MWEYA MUKASIYA NZIRA IYI MUNO RASISA WANHU WA MWARI ,ZVINO MUKARASISA WANHU KUNYANGWE MUNHU MUMWECHETE ZVAKE IDI MUCHAMU VHUNZWA NA BABA WANGU WAKANDI TUMA.
